Configuration & Queries Used: 

  {
    "slug": "parallel-marking-experiment-2",
    "histograms": [
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_max_pause_ms_2",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_during_idle",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_sweep_ms"
    ],
    "pageload_event_metrics": {
        "fcp_time": [
            0,
            10000
        ],
        "lcp_time": [
            0,
            30000
        ],
        "load_time": [
            0,
            30000
        ],
        "js_exec_time": [
            0,
            10000
        ]
    },
    "segments": {
        "All": [],
        "Windows": [
            "AND normalized_os = 'Windows'"
        ],
        "Linux": [
            "AND normalized_os = 'Linux'"
        ],
        "Mac": [
            "AND normalized_os = 'Mac'"
        ]
    },
    "is_experiment": true,
    "startDate": "2023-12-23",
    "endDate": "2024-01-08",
    "channel": "nightly",
    "branches": [
        "disabled",
        "enabled"
    ]
}
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  fcp_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  fcp_time >= 0 AND fcp_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'lcp_time') AS int) AS lcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  lcp_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  lcp_time >= 0 AND lcp_time <= 30000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  load_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  load_time >= 0 AND load_time <= 30000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "nightly"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  js_exec_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  js_exec_time >= 0 AND js_exec_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_max_pause_ms_2, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_max_pause_ms_2 is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_mark_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_during_idle, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_slice_during_idle is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_sweep_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main_nightly`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-12-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-01-08')
        AND normalized_channel = "nightly"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_sweep_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "parallel-marking-experiment-2").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
